name: map_stakeholders
description: Manage a stakeholder registry for a BA project. Track each stakeholder's role, influence level (high/medium/low), position (champion/supporter/neutral/blocker/unknown), and engagement approach. Supports influence/interest matrix analysis grouped into four quadrants (Manage Closely, Keep Satisfied, Keep Informed, Monitor) and a RACI position summary. Use this when the user wants to identify, record, or analyse project stakeholders.

action.description: 'add' a new stakeholder, 'update' an existing one, 'remove' by stakeholder_id, 'list' all stakeholders for a project, 'analyze' the influence/interest matrix for a project.

user_id.description: User ID from session context. Always required.

project.description: Project name or identifier. Required for add, list, and analyze.

stakeholder_id.description: UUID of the stakeholder record. Required for update and remove.

name.description: Full name of the stakeholder. Required for add.

role.description: Stakeholder's organisational role or job title.

interest.description: Level of interest in the project outcome: high, medium, or low.

influence.description: Level of influence over project decisions: high, medium, or low.

record.description: Full stakeholder record after the operation (add/update).

matrix_markdown.description: Markdown table of the influence/interest matrix (analyze).
